title: verbascum adenocarpum
intro: Verbascum adenocarpum, also known as the woolly mullein or giant mullein, is a species of flowering plant in the mullein family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Verbascum adenocarpum include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to protect against bacterial and viral infections. In herbal preparations, Verbascum adenocarpum is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although it should be used with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
